title: ornithogalum arvense
intro: Ornithogalum arvense, also known as wild onion grass or desert candle, is a flowering plant species in the lily family. It is used in traditional medicine for its purported medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits associated with Ornithogalum arvense include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Ornithogalum arvense typically involve the leaves and flowers being dried and made into teas, infusions, or decoctions for consumption.
